message:
feat: Add operator callable structs and more runtime exports

Operator callable structs (for operator.mod, operator.pow, etc.):
- OperatorMod: Python floored modulo semantics for floats
- OperatorPow: Power operation with float conversion
- OperatorTruediv: True division returning float
- OperatorFloordiv: Floor division for int and float

Additional runtime exports:
- floatAsIntegerRatio: Float to integer ratio conversion
- toIntBig: Integer conversion with BigInt support
- pow alias for pyPow in builtins

Array iteration fix (for_basic.zig):
- Added array type handling in both len and item dispatch
- Fixes iteration over compile-time arrays like VALID_UNDERSCORE_LITERALS

test_float still needs: runtime.math, floatGetFormat, packInt exports
